generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a retired intelligence analyst, I've seen firsthand how our current security laws leave gaps that terrorists exploit. The new domestic security measures aren't about restricting freedoms - they're about closing those gaps. My colleagues and I who've worked in the field agree: these powers would help prevent another major attack. We can't afford to wait until after the next tragedy to act. #NationalSecurityFirst
